मीठी यादों से भरा त्योहार, आतिशबाजी से भरा आसमान, मिठाइयों से भरा मुंह, दीयों से भरा घर और मौज-मस्ती से भरा दिल। माता लक्ष्मी और भगवान गणेश की कृपा से, आपका जीवन हमेशा खुशियों और सफलताओं से भरा रहे। दिवाली कि हार्दिक शुभकामनाएँ ” @🐦‍🔥BattleKing aur sabi ko

King Sandeep 26-12-2024 12:32
Forwarded
We are pleased to wish you a Happy New Year! How quickly time has flown by.... It's not surprising, because throughout the year we worked hard and released 10 global updates, including more than a thousand changes in total! Can you believe it? On the occasion of the approaching holiday, we decided to please our dear players additionally! Therefore, from 27 to 29 December, we are re-launching the opportunity to get 15 Grand Coins for 5 hours of play on any Grand RP server! And now the main thing. We sincerely congratulate each of our players with the coming new year, thank you for playing on the project, share your suggestions for updates, in other words, do not remain indifferent. At one time we could not even imagine that the project will unite tens of thousands of players from all over the world, giving positive emotions, this is our great pride! From the bottom of my heart let me wish you success in the coming year, health to you and your loved ones, as well as happiness! And we promise to continue to please you in the coming year! Ahead of all of us await new achievements, which we hope that we will pass together! @everyone
Originally sent: 26-12-2024 12:31

👻TiTu Mama👻 08-03-2025 08:08
Happy Women's Day Hello @everyone Today, on International Women's Day, let's take a moment to appreciate and celebrate the strength, courage, and achievements of women around the world! Women are the backbone of society—be it as mothers, sisters, friends, or leaders. They inspire us, support us, and make the world a better place with their kindness and determination. Let's always stand for equality, respect, and empowerment for all women, not just today but every day. A big salute to all the amazing women out there! Feel free to tag and appreciate the wonderful women in your life in the chat! #RespectWomen Happy Women's Day! —The kingdom family
